name: Perdue Files | Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: So many lies❗️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Perdue continues to deceive voters |
---
Friend,

Jon Ossoff's opponent, David Perdue, doesn't just lie in his ads and mailers -- _he is lying on his campaign website!_

Take a look at what Perdue says versus what is actually true: | Myth | Fact
---|---
On COVID-19: _"My number one focus is the safety and security of all Georgians during these challenging times."_ | After learning of COVID-19's severity, Perdue traded stocks to line his own pockets rather than prepare Georgians for the pandemic.
On the economy: _"Our winning agenda created the greatest economic turnaround in U.S. history."_ | Millions of Americans are unemployed and struggling to pay rent. Less than half of the 22 million jobs lost early in the pandemic have come back.
On health care: _"I believe in protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions"_ | He's voted _multiple times_ against the ACA and its protections for 1.8 million Georgians with pre-existing conditions.

| [CHIP IN TO DEFEAT PERDUE](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e4f/5b2c1286/3b0393ba/25f3bee5/1596421866/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_perdue_myft?refcode=em_2020_09_21_perdue_myft")
---

**Friend, David Perdue's campaign is sinking FAST. His only hope to try to win over voters is to deceive them.**

But Perdue's record is undeniable. He puts his own interests and those of his corporate donors first -- and his constituents last.

**_And Georgians see right through his lies._**

That's why Jon Ossoff is leading in the polls, and has all the momentum to win this race. **But we have a critical end-of-quarter deadline coming up, and we're falling behind.** **[Friend, can you make a donation TODAY to help Jon beat Perdue and give the people of Georgia a Senator whom they can trust?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e4f/5b2c1286/3b0393ba/25f3bee5/1596421866/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_perdue_myft?refcode=em_2020_09_21_perdue_myft")**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
---
Friend,

Within *minutes* of Amy Coney Barrett's nomination, my opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, endorsed her for the Supreme Court.

_Within minutes._

In 2016, Senator Perdue was ADAMANT that no Supreme Court confirmation should proceed in a presidential election year.

_He said it was a matter of principle!_

**Now, with 38 days until the Election -- and voting already underway -- he didn't even think the nominee needed to answer questions under oath before he announced his support.** **_So much for David Perdue's principles._**

**[Help me beat hypocrite David Perdue and win the Senate>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbfd/3077833393/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc")**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__
| | **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbfc/3077833393/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_10")**
---
| **[$20->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbff/3077833393/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_20")**
---
| **[$50->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbfe/3077833393/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_50")**
---
| **[$75->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bb01/3077833393/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_75")**
---
| **[$100->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bb00/3077833393/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_100")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bb03/3077833393/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc_ex_other")**
---
This is why the Senate is so important.

**Here are some questions of VITAL CONCERN regarding this nominee that need answering:**
* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law and defend the public interest by upholding the Affordable Care Act,**which prevents insurance companies from denying health coverage to Americans suffering from cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and other pre-existing conditions?**_

* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law in_ **Roe v. Wade _and defend the fundamental right to privacy in health care?_**

* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law and**protect Voting Rights and Civil Rights legislation that secures Americans' Constitutional right to Equal Protection?**_
My opponent doesn't care. He's not asking these questions. He's already made up his mind.

Because, for him, it's all about party loyalty -- no matter the consequences for his own constituents.

**The Senate must put the law and its Constitutional obligations ahead of partisanship.**

In the Senate, I'll support the thorough, deliberative, and full vetting of any Supreme Court nominee -- _no matter whether a President from my own party nominates them_ \-- because that's the obligation of a United States Senator.

**[Friend, with health care,_Roe v. Wade_ , civil rights, and voting rights at stake, winning the Senate has never mattered more >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbfd/3077833393/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc")**
| [CHIP IN TO WIN THE SENATE](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e43/5b2c1286/3b0a4f80/25f3bbfd/3077833393/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc")
---

This is the closest Senate race in the country, friend.

There's a reason Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger.

The stakes have never been higher.

I am grateful for your help.

Jon Ossoff

clean_body: | Friend, Within minutes of Amy Coney Barrett's nomination, my opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, endorsed her for the Supreme Court. Within minutes. In 2016, Senator Perdue was ADAMANT that no Supreme Court confirmation should proceed in a presidential election year. He said it was a matter of principle! Now, with 38 days until the Election -- and voting already underway -- he didn't even think the nominee needed to answer questions under oath before he announced his support. So much for David Perdue's principles. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" This is why the Senate is so important. Here are some questions of VITAL CONCERN regarding this nominee that need answering: Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law and defend the public interest by upholding the Affordable Care Act,which prevents insurance companies from denying health coverage to Americans suffering from cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and other pre-existing conditions? Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law in Roe v. Wade and defend the fundamental right to privacy in health care? Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law andprotect Voting Rights and Civil Rights legislation that secures Americans' Constitutional right to Equal Protection? My opponent doesn't care. He's not asking these questions. He's already made up his mind. Because, for him, it's all about party loyalty -- no matter the consequences for his own constituents. The Senate must put the law and its Constitutional obligations ahead of partisanship. In the Senate, I'll support the thorough, deliberative, and full vetting of any Supreme Court nominee -- no matter whether a President from my own party nominates them \-- because that's the obligation of a United States Senator. ""** | "" This is the closest Senate race in the country, friend. There's a reason Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger. The stakes have never been higher. I am grateful for your help. Jon Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Trump just announced his pick!
body:
President Trump just nominated...
Peter,President Trump just nominated Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett is a principled constitutionalist and an excellent pick for our nation's highest court. But Democrats will do ANYTHING to stop us from filling this vacancy and President Trump will need allies in this confirmation fight. Friend,

We have a big fundraising deadline on Wednesday at midnight and I want to take a few minutes to explain why this deadline is so important. Our final Federal Elections Commission quarterly report is due at the end of the month, and we can’t afford to fall short of our $30,000 goal.

This deadline is important for the campaign: We have built a budget that allows us to communicate with voters across the district. If we don’t meet our goals, we can’t communicate. It’s that simple. But, I also know that we WILL meet our goals, because we have thousands of supporters who are as determined as I am to create the change we deserve.

This deadline is also important to show strength: Vern Buchanan’s campaign team and the media will be combing over our report looking for any signs of weakness and we must show that we continue to run a campaign that is powered by us, the people, not corporate special interests.

**We are gaining momentum every day, but we have to keep pushing. This isn’t a race for the faint of heart -- we are fighting every single day for every single vote and we need you there with us.**

**[We are still $14,735 short of our goal, and need you to rush a contribution right now to help us close the gap before our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19617193/253791082/1073285021?refcode2=649b2f5c-cb00-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=93ffbf35-cb00-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=649b2f5c-cb00-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=092720-es-eoq-3-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDliMmY1Yy1jYjAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2g8cbr_FeshL0yFQcAXFI7ktzimYZ3VOSRa-D7OLsco=)**

clean_body: Friend, We have a big fundraising deadline on Wednesday at midnight and I want to take a few minutes to explain why this deadline is so important. Our final Federal Elections Commission quarterly report is due at the end of the month, and we can’t afford to fall short of our $30,000 goal. This deadline is important for the campaign: We have built a budget that allows us to communicate with voters across the district. If we don’t meet our goals, we can’t communicate. It’s that simple. But, I also know that we WILL meet our goals, because we have thousands of supporters who are as determined as I am to create the change we deserve. This deadline is also important to show strength: Vern Buchanan’s campaign team and the media will be combing over our report looking for any signs of weakness and we must show that we continue to run a campaign that is powered by us, the people, not corporate special interests. We are gaining momentum every day, but we have to keep pushing. This isn’t a race for the faint of heart -- we are fighting every single day for every single vote and we need you there with us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We can’t fall behind during this critical moment in our campaign, and I’m counting on you to help lift us up. clean_body: | = | | Our country is on fire. Millions of acres have burned, wiping out people's homes and livelihoods, smoke has choked out the sky, and dozens have lost their lives. Meanwhile on the other side of Texas, we’re on track to have the most active hurricane season in history. This is not normal. We need a leader in TX-10 who actually cares about a livable planet ― it’s truly life or death.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = This isn’t an ecological ambush ― we’ve seen it coming for decades, and have been demanding solutions from our representatives for just as long. And for 15 years, Michael McCaul has ducked, dodged, and deserted his district and his country. He doesn’t have a plan to combat the climate crisis that is already costing us lives and billions of dollars each year. This problem should be above politics ― it’s about finding people, regardless of party, who will step up and offer real solutions. McCaul has had 15 years. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks friends, Team Siegel | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Hannah Nayowith

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Just wanted to make sure you saw Mondaire’s email from Thursday...
#

Just wanted to make sure you saw Mondaire’s email from Thursday.
**We’ve set a $30,000 goal ahead of the final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline in only three days, and at this rate, we’re going to fall short.**
**[Could you make a contribution today to help us meet our fundraising goal and have the resources we need for the last month of the campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19622977/253818666/-1084116692?refcode2=43906672-e000-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200927-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzkwNjY3Mi1lMDAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goc4xWfS6kutzy_5p6Imt7TWz5V23ug5B4giWKnsfWg=)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager
* * *
_Original email:_
This is a movement of and for working people.
Running a campaign like this means we’re relying on supporters like you, giving whatever you can afford, to make sure we can keep the trains running.
**Our final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is in six days.** Afterwards, we’ll have to report our fundraising numbers and show everyone the strength of our grassroots movement.
**My team has set a goal for us to raise an additional $30,000 to round out the month ahead of this critical end-of-quarter deadline.[I would be so thankful if you could make a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19622978/253818667/-1084116692?refcode2=43906672-e000-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200927-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzkwNjY3Mi1lMDAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goc4xWfS6kutzy_5p6Imt7TWz5V23ug5B4giWKnsfWg=)**
In the final stretch before Election Day, my staff, volunteers, and I are organizing to turn out voters in our district and for candidates I’ve endorsed around the country. Our goal is to elect the most progressive Congress we’ve ever had.
Your financial support allows us to focus on the work that matters instead of worrying about fundraising, and if every person reading this email made a contribution, we would hit this goal in no time.
**[Your donation to our campaign today will make a huge difference. Please chip in whatever you can to support my campaign and our fight to expand opportunity for working people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19622979/253818668/-1084116692?refcode2=43906672-e000-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=em200927-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzkwNjY3Mi1lMDAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=goc4xWfS6kutzy_5p6Imt7TWz5V23ug5B4giWKnsfWg=)**
Thank you for your support,
Mondaire

name: Jon Ossoff (personal inbox)
subject: Friend, I need your help today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Our biggest fundraising deadline is coming up. |
---
Friend,

Our most important grassroots fundraising deadline is THIS WEDNESDAY.

**The Federal Election Commission's quarterly deadline is right around the corner at the end of the month.**

**Once we submit our numbers to the FEC after Wednesday, we'll have to start locking in budget decisions for the final few weeks of the campaign --_decisions that will determine the future of the United States Senate._**

**That's why I'm setting a hugely ambitious and absolutely necessary goal of raising $200,000 in grassroots donations by 11:59 PM on Wednesday.**

This is the biggest moment yet for this campaign, friend. The U.S. Senate hangs in the balance. Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more here than anywhere else. **[I need your help now.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e44/5b2c1286/3b33a529/25f3b9c6/2811881377/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal?refcode=em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal")**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e44/5b2c1286/3b33a529/25f3b9c9/2811881377/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal?refcode=em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal_img") | | [CHIP IN TO ELECT JON](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e44/5b2c1286/3b33a529/25f3b9c6/2811881377/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal?refcode=em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal")
---

Friend, I don't have to tell you what's at stake in this Election.

A Supreme Court seat, the future of the Affordable Care Act and _Roe v. Wade_ , and the health and safety of all Americans during this deadly pandemic.

**It's never been more important for Democrats to win a majority in the United States Senate --_and Senate control is coming down to my race in Georgia._**

_Right now, I am DEAD EVEN in the polls with David Perdue, Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" and No. 1 enabler in the Senate._

**[Friend, I need your support to keep us on the path to victory. Can you make a donation today to help us reach our end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising goal?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e44/5b2c1286/3b33a529/25f3b9c6/2811881377/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal?refcode=em_2020_09_26_j_eoq_goal")**

clean_body: Our biggest fundraising deadline is coming up. | Friend, Our most important grassroots fundraising deadline is THIS WEDNESDAY. The Federal Election Commission's quarterly deadline is right around the corner at the end of the month. Once we submit our numbers to the FEC after Wednesday, we'll have to start locking in budget decisions for the final few weeks of the campaign --decisions that will determine the future of the United States Senate. That's why I'm setting a hugely ambitious and absolutely necessary goal of raising $200,000 in grassroots donations by 11:59 PM on Wednesday. This is the biggest moment yet for this campaign, friend. The U.S. Senate hangs in the balance. Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more here than anywhere else. "" "" | | "" Friend, I don't have to tell you what's at stake in this Election. A Supreme Court seat, the future of the Affordable Care Act and Roe v. Wade , and the health and safety of all Americans during this deadly pandemic. It's never been more important for Democrats to win a majority in the United States Senate --and Senate control is coming down to my race in Georgia. Right now, I am DEAD EVEN in the polls with David Perdue, Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" and No. 1 enabler in the Senate. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this, friend. Much love, Jon | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

There’s more at stake in this election than just our community. Pete Sessions was once one of the most powerful Republicans in Congress, where he eagerly worked with Mitch McConnell to push their shared agenda: to accumulate power and money at the expense of everyday Texans.
**If our community sends him back to Congress, he will go right back to being the right-hand man for his special-interest backers and Mitch McConnell.**

| | Hear me out Peter,

I'm going to ask you to make a donation, but first, let me explain why. **[If you're already with me, you can pitch in now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce0/7f51f7bc/44660937/4efa5ede/1627186524/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxOTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200927.1nd__2199__&amount=10")**

Senator Cornyn has been in Washington for 18 years fighting, not on behalf of you and the people of Texas, but for his special interest donors. He's ignoring our issues and instead spends his time focusing on the profit margins of corporate PAC donors that'll pour money into his campaign.

The mission is clear: Texas needs a senator who will work for Texas. A senator who will combat rising health care costs, lead us out of the COVID-19 pandemic, fight against climate change and, most importantly, listen to working families.

**[I will be that senator, and I will always fight for people just like you.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce0/7f51f7bc/44660937/4efa5ede/1627186524/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxOTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200927.1nd__2199__&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Help us grow the team
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f17f15695f75/help-us-grow-the-team?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | A couple of weeks ago, I sent you an email formally introducing you to my amazing team. They are the foundation of this campaign. I value the work that each and every one of them does, and we have done incredible work in IL-16 as a team.

**I have some good news: our campaign is growing exponentially.** Every day, we are adding more and more volunteers to this campaign - and after a successful debate yesterday, those numbers will just continue to grow. This means that we need to hire another field organizer. Field organizers train and oversee our wonderful army of volunteers, build relationships all throughout this big district, and make hundreds of voter contact calls every single day. Field organizers are essential for any successful campaign.

**My Finance Director just told me we need to raise an additional $2,000 by midnight if we are going to add another member to this team.**

[I hope I can count on you to help us hire another field organizer and grow the campaign.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=aebe5b1433&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

Andy Barr is saying that Josh is “bankrolled” by liberal donors in Washington, D.C. But it’s Andy Barr — not Josh — who has taken over $2.5 million from D.C. donors. It’s Andy Barr, not Josh, whose campaign runs on corporate PAC dollars. And it’s Andy Barr, not Josh, who has taken those contributions and sold his constituents out to Big Pharma, Wall Street, and payday lenders.
**Here’s the truth about _our_ campaign:**
✅ More than 12,000 people have contributed to our campaign in the last year! Our average online donation this quarter is $36.
✅ Our donors include teachers, nurses, cashiers, school bus drivers, enlisted and former servicemen and women, truck drivers, mechanics, secretaries, and retired folks.

✅ Grassroots donors helped us close the fundraising gap last quarter — and helped us get television and digital ads up before the attacks came so we could share our message and Josh’s story.
**The truth is that YOU are the backbone of our campaign. And, with your support, we’re running a race we can be proud of. Now we’re facing our most urgent deadline of the entire campaign.**
[_**So, if you can, chip in $36 or more today to help us reach our goal before **September 30. Your support today will help us fight off Barr’s lies and get out the truth about Josh for the rest of the campaign**.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19627995/253837572/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200927EOQ5_TH_all_ld_l2&amount=36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmNhODZhYS1mMzAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVB0CLtnhT03xxReCJSp08r7aTAsySdh0kQtve6H1Rk=)

name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: Help us get through the home stretch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails from folks trying to hit their end-of-quarter deadlines, so I will keep this as brief as possible.
|
---

| | Derek --

I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails from folks trying to hit their end-of-quarter deadlines, so I will keep this as brief as possible. I'm going to ask you to chip in to support Mark Warner's re-election campaign as we head into the final stretch of this election, but first let me explain why.

I've been on this team for a while now, and I've seen how hard Mark works. He's the kind of guy who will roll up his sleeves and work until the job is done, whether he's working across the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the resources they need to face the coronavirus pandemic or working to expand rural broadband coverage to make sure everyone has a fair shot to work and learn. His goal has _always_ been to make sure that everyone in the Commonwealth has equal access to opportunities and the resources they need to succeed -- no matter what their ZIP code is.

As the finance director, I've gotten to see firsthand just how many Virginians are putting their trust in Mark Warner. We've seen campaign contributions from every corner of the Commonwealth, and we are so grateful for your support.

This campaign is fueled by grassroots donors, and it's vitally important that we continue to hit our fundraising goals so that we can finish this race strong. That's why some generous donors have agreed to match your donation to help us reach this critical end-of-quarter goal, _**which means that your contribution counts as double right now**_**.[Can you chip in while we have our dollar-for-dollar match active?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da8a/53d9897e/558b85c3/1c881dd1/3865358054/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20200927_f_1_nd__820__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

If you've been thinking about chipping in, now is the time. Your money will go twice as far! We're less than 40 days away from Election Day, and this team is committed to continue to connect with voters and make sure that everyone turns out to keep Virginia blue.

**[We can't do it without you -- can you help us meet our fundraising goal?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da8a/53d9897e/558b85c3/1c881dd0/3865358054/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20200927_f_1_nd__820__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for all of your support!

-- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da8a/53d9897e/558b85c3/1c881ddf/3865358054/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20200927_f_1_nd__820__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Sri
subject: A note on urgency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

The urgency of this moment -- our election -- can’t be overstated.

Our opponent, helped by Washington Republican PAC money, is blanketing the airwaves in ads to cover up his record as a police officer who was fired for misconduct.

Meanwhile, our team is reaching out to new voters and building a lasting movement for change.

This is what sets us apart, friend -- and it means the difference between having a representative beholden to DC special interests and a representative beholden to you.

Republican Super PACs are pouring almost a million dollars into TV ads in the 37 days before our election, and we must do everything we can to stop them from trying to buy this seat that way.

It’s time to stop that kind of politics from influencing the way our elections are run -- and to do that, we need your help to stop them.

Chip in now to ensure that we do: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.27_b1_sp_all&amount=25

Thanks,
Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.27_b1_sp_all&amount=5&recurring=1]

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.27_b1_sp_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS

clean_body: Friend, The urgency of this moment -- our election -- can’t be overstated. Our opponent, helped by Washington Republican PAC money, is blanketing the airwaves in ads to cover up his record as a police officer who was fired for misconduct. Meanwhile, our team is reaching out to new voters and building a lasting movement for change. This is what sets us apart, friend -- and it means the difference between having a representative beholden to DC special interests and a representative beholden to you. Republican Super PACs are pouring almost a million dollars into TV ads in the 37 days before our election, and we must do everything we can to stop them from trying to buy this seat that way. It’s time to stop that kind of politics from influencing the way our elections are run -- and to do that, we need your help to stop them. Chip in now to ensure that we do: Thanks, Sri Can you make it weekly? Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down. Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way! MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ [] Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. subject: Donald Trump is losing in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The Democrats are going to win here |
---
Friend -- It's close, but right now **Joe Biden is winning in Georgia!**

_Donald Trump is so worried about losing to a Democrat in Georgia that he flew here a few days ago for a photo op!_

Biden isn't the only Democrat who's leading in a tight race in Georgia. **Jon Ossoff has a slight edge against GOP Senator David Perdue.** And Reverend Raphael Warnock has a shot at winning the other Senate seat here.

We're not being hyperbolic, friend: All eyes are on Georgia in this Election.

**Trump's got no chance of winning re-election without Georgia._And if Jon stays on this path to victory, he'll be sworn into a Democrat-controlled Senate!_**

These things can happen, but we need your help, friend.

**[Wednesday night is our last (and biggest) end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the Election, and we need to pick up the pace to reach our goal. Can you chip in a few dollars RIGHT NOW to win in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e2b/5b2c1286/3b3bc762/25f245a9/3460453678/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_28_trmp_losing_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_28_trmp_losing_eoq")**

clean_body: The Democrats are going to win here | Friend -- It's close, but right now Joe Biden is winning in Georgia! Donald Trump is so worried about losing to a Democrat in Georgia that he flew here a few days ago for a photo op! Biden isn't the only Democrat who's leading in a tight race in Georgia. Jon Ossoff has a slight edge against GOP Senator David Perdue. And Reverend Raphael Warnock has a shot at winning the other Senate seat here. We're not being hyperbolic, friend: All eyes are on Georgia in this Election. Trump's got no chance of winning re-election without Georgia.And if Jon stays on this path to victory, he'll be sworn into a Democrat-controlled Senate! These things can happen, but we need your help, friend. body:
Reading this email was the perfect way to start my week off. | |
---
Friend -

I was going through my emails this morning and ran across this one from a couple weeks ago. It was too good not to share.

It’s clear that Chris Pappas believes Matt has what it takes to win the election...and he’s terrified.

Chris Pappas and Nancy Pelosi are scared. We can send them a message by making this Matt’s BIGGEST fundraising quarter to date. John,

**National Republicans are throwing their support and resources behind our opponent Matt Mowers because they think he has a chance at flipping NH-01 red.** That's why they named him a top priority "Young Guns" candidate to take back the House majority.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Air circulation, a new data dashboard, and the first day of fall
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap of the announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0WsD1cN_TOjsFsL0PG5tHAAPo9xPQtQ4RzU1C8LF9pIjXBm687YOTLdlkM_kPl4rTqYzL-P4HolOA5xRPyLFpukwQCtpggD-n46TpHqDA27H_dFaG-w_Zr8WcoF58KNmr-nWBkJq4L-ebyZOXjORYR1gTbD8a1Qz-6Wg8XkthGWCXn8zFulXVItqt3Z4InSR8_LBpcqDYHsNFcmEy7fcyTjdEf9YJ5XYvc6cX2nRXNWmNwoaSztYQ_YTnlUg-I3V6mpWQV5Ju9HXciKdS5QqRrMM=&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
AIR CIRCULATION
Over the last few months, state and school leaders have worked 24/7 to safely reopen our schools. That work would not have been possible without the input of public health experts, from pediatricians to epidemiologists and more. Throughout this crisis, we've relied on the data, and we've put our trust in scientists to guide our decisions.
These scientists looked at data of what's called "air changes per hour" - or how often air is circulated in and out of a certain room - to determine how best to address COVID-19 in indoor settings. Based on their recommendations, we have put together a helpful [page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0Wk_K7ikrQGAk_Qx_trIDn5fLXjlTPLVzoZLnSva3GUZNGFfXICgsJNk6CIu7my113eWjxcDqRIJsPkcFxvHSXIvLVaQTq4OVSA==&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==) with the best ways to keep indoor settings safely ventilated.
| | |
---|---
|
NEW DATA DASHBOARD

Going forward, we're making some additions to the data that we display on our daily dashboard on the Rhode Island Department of Health [website.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0Wviih_MCAm0mTY1cXz_QJK7JqHfU56yHTpXJQLLRvMA4s2khQl-Yq1sM8h4PgKMSJJUfvIu6YzcxvLrct46ImxFDqfrZBxg84KPgd3S_0DH2EcCn9rjihGrTgah9XCOelqr-W0fW_2d5hILYLxxidEo=&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==)In addition to the numbers we've been tracking the whole time, like the total number of tests and daily positive cases, we're also going to start showing you the most recent trends.

The dashboard will now have three graphs graphs showing three weekly metrics -- average percent positive rate, new hospitalizations, and new cases per 100,000 residents -- over the past 8 weeks. Each graph has a red line representing the threshold above which we need to consider imposing new restrictions and trend arrows comparing each of those three data points to the previous week. These new additions will make it easier to tell at a glance where we doing well and where we need to improve.
| | |
---|---
|
FALL

Even as the weather changes, we can still take it outside. Nothing is more quintessentially New England than our fall traditions like apple picking, pumpkin carving, and checking out our beautiful foliage. This year it's going to be more important than ever that we find ways to have fun outdoors so that we can stop the spread of COVID-19.

And don't forget: you have more access to outdoor space this fall than ever before through the [Take It Outside](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0WvabCrGrY0lHwGGUCm3WlyHfikvBnU8S-oV4Jr3iHz1wfECzIWHwIDjsi56LEKe6sUFxFucr8qQtWBXF1qbzYF8-FTjpgdo2lQ==&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==) campaign. You can [reserve space](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0WnijJ7atm1YohagtM03eAgt3nA3NhWCiJE0abjerVfce2Q-gj6RPMrT2vLTbRBIASI69scvwEzF8zYz4mG7r-sVqnv2fucs3qBgR5xniGdnZ9OXiXxwxJ8g=&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==) at one of Rhode Island's beautiful state parks that are taking part in the initiative, or visit your town or city's website to learn about how they're opening up their outdoor spaces for reservation.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ojRwUuayqRWGkIh1at_tJOqjRZbpz7RSA8SHSuc_Leq_b_SKP8v0WsD1cN_TOjsFaiNc5qP-tUyDM-wYWOGrUKSzfe1fUAO90IrbuKgScrioXjmO3CEfiiZqqmcRi_Q5zSAV3B38RVmKbVmzrC5xr1H-77dKvIRBfIIPWXBeryp39LoFLgWvVN19VshLkg52v14YqAndNTeljoqhbRGPgnz7akvVtWztZ9VdjsnoTp60PiZeruwk_7-3IVSCp_Q-p0dZ_syAftBxPGwzR34M3q3mMHTtJs2ZbV0CUCk2aPz_h6LrS17R64KIZm3_UbnHEp9fddZKuec=&c=Y0k16xAIL-_dg2zMw9y-EhymFagmQBW6Xj_Ynsfhd-2QEHDT-rNxTw==&ch=jiqWKpP7Qg3JUitSbNPAGzF-pysA69qeOBp3DQAzPU8-Tr5O5t_xQg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=f3bc9fc7-cc44-4261-b50c-e37773b3e411)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=f3bc9fc7-cc44-4261-b50c-e37773b3e411) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

Looking for a great way to make a difference in this year’s elections? We've got the perfect way. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/elections-powered-by-you?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

| Hoosier Republican,

**Looking for a way to ****m****ake a difference in this year’s elections?**

Working at the polls during the election is a great way to support your community, state, and country. **Poll workers are the people who make freedom work!** They're the ones who set up your polling location, check your ID, prepare your ballot and make sure that election laws are followed.

[Complete this form](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff9475fc50&e=1acd9bb3d6), and let us know that you'd like to work the polls in your area on Election Day!

There are several paid positions at the polls. Whether you're acting as an election inspector, judge, poll clerk, assistant poll clerk, or sheriff -- serving as a poll worker is a great way to make a difference in your community.

If you're interested in being a poll worker for the November 3 election, [fill out this form](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ca57a9d0f&e=1acd9bb3d6) and we'll pass your name along to your local Republican Party leaders! There are limited spots available, so sign up today!

name: Laura Loomer
subject: How we act today . . .
body:
This weekend, I’ve had the opportunity to meet many of you in your homes, and I’ve listened to your anxieties and concerns about the future of our great nation.
| | |
Patriot,

Today we celebrate Yom Kippur, the holiest day in the Jewish calendar and the conclusion of our High Holy Days. On this day each year, Jews fast and pray. We also ask others for forgiveness and reflect carefully on our own behavior and actions.

Depending on how we act during Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur, our fate for the year is decided, and, if we have lived well, we are inscribed in the Book of Life.

This weekend, I’ve had the opportunity to meet many of you in your homes, and I’ve listened to your anxieties and concerns about the future of our great nation. This has made this year’s holy day of introspection and self-reflection an especially meaningful experience.

Yom Kippur is a chance to deepen our relationship with God through the practice of teshuva, or repentance. As it says in Leviticus: "For on this day shall atonement be made for you, to cleanse you; from all your sins shall ye be clean before the Lord." >From my family to yours: Have a meaningful fast. G’mar chatima tova.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Taylor Klos, MJ Hegar Finance Director
subject: Peter -- we've come so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need your help to reach the undecided voters who will swing this election.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce2/7f51f7bc/447c79ea/4efa403a/3200975888/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- With Election Day just over a month away, we're looking back on how far our grassroots campaign has come:
* **FIRST** , the polls showed a tightening race in Texas, with **MJ just one point behind Sen. Cornyn**.
* **THEN** , we launched **our first TV ad** of the general election.
* **NOW** , we need your help **reaching undecided voters** so we can **[surge into first place and WIN on Election Day!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce2/7f51f7bc/447c79ea/4efa4039/3200975888/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200927.2nd__2202__&amount=10")**

We've come a long way, Peter, and that's thanks to this amazing grassroots team working to change the status quo. In this home stretch, we're relying on your support to reach every Texan across the state. **Will you pitch in to help us secure a win for MJ and a better future for Texas?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ossoff HQ
subject: Jon Ossoff → SURGING!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The GOP's total control over Georgia is over. |
---
Friend, we can win this thing. Remember this poll from last week??
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e28/5b2c1286/3b23b51d/25f2430a/123149501/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq_img")
It's proof that this race is anyone's game right now. **[Chip in $20 today to break the tie!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e28/5b2c1286/3b23b51d/25f2430d/123149501/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq&amount=20")**

| | [CHIP IN $20 IMMEDIATELY](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e28/5b2c1286/3b23b51d/25f2430d/123149501/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq?refcode=em_2020_09_27_polls_eoq&amount=20")
---

And it's not only that. Jon Ossoff's momentum is **_SURGING,_** while David Perdue (you know, the anti-Semitic ad-running, Trump-loving, stock-trading guy) is **_stalling._**

Republicans used to think they had total control over Georgia, but that's not true anymore, **_and they're PANICKING_**.

That's why Mitch McConnell is dumping truckloads of cash into attack ads against Jon Ossoff. That's why Eric Trump, Don Jr., Ivanka Trump, Bill Barr AND President Donald Trump have ALL visited Georgia within the past TWO WEEKS.

**That's why, here at Ossoff HQ, we know that Jon can win this thing.**

But here's the thing: He can't do it alone. **We're just days away from our last end-of-quarter deadline before the Election, and it's CRITICAL we meet our fundraising goal.**

We need to make sure we have all the resources necessary to carry Jon's momentum all the way through Election Day. **_So we need your help._**

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
President Trump just officially announced he has selected Amy Coney Barrett, former law clerk to Antonin Scalia, to fill the vacancy on the Supreme Court.
Now, Mitch McConnell and his fellow Republicans are gearing up to ram this confirmation through the Senate with just five weeks to go until Election Day.
**[The American people must rise up in this moment and oppose this blatant attempt to circumvent the will of the people weeks before Election Day. Add your name now to oppose any confirmation before the next President is sworn in.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff426c/42ab3cf4/6785d9be/135d0b05/1765651284/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/no-scotus-confirmation?source=em200926i_1007&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Before she died, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg's final wish was that the next President would choose her successor. It's so important that we honor the legacy of this incredible woman and let the American people's voices be heard on November 3 before filling this vacancy.
But President Trump and Leader McConnell are hellbent on dishonoring Justice Ginsburg by appointing an extreme far-right Justice who will rubber stamp their harmful agenda, including sabotaging health care access.
Here are the facts: The next Supreme Court will decide the fate of affordable health care -- and Judge Barrett is already on the record stating that the Supreme Court case that saved the Affordable Care Act was wrongly decided.
If the Republicans get their way, they'll have another vote on the highest court in the land to repeal our affordable health care law and leave millions without the coverage they need.
**[We must do everything we can to fight back. Sign on now to urge Republicans to follow the McConnell rule and wait until after Inauguration Day to confirm any new Justices to the Supreme Court.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff426c/42ab3cf4/6785d9be/135d0b05/1765651284/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/no-scotus-confirmation?source=em200926i_1007&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff426c/42ab3cf4/6785d9be/135d0b05/1765651284/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/no-scotus-confirmation?source=em200926i_1007&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff426c/42ab3cf4/6785d9be/135d0b06/1765651284/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff426c/42ab3cf4/6785d9be/135d0b07/1765651284/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

subject: Georgia is going blue in November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Winning control of the Senate is more important than ever, team.
There are a lot of must-win Senate races we're watching this year, including the two elections happening in Georgia that could help determine which party controls the Senate in 2021.
**We are doing everything we can through Patty Murray 's Sprint to 2020 program to help Democrats Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock win these pivotal races in Georgia.**
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution now to flip Georgia and elect a Democratic Senate?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200926-georgia-slate?refcode=em200926i_489&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Jon is facing Republican incumbent David Perdue who has been focused on lining his own pockets rather than putting Georgians first and keeping them safe during this pandemic.
Raphael is up against GOP Senator Kelly Loeffler, the richest member of Congress who brags about her record of voting with President Trump 100% of the time. Polls show Raphael within striking distance of victory.
We need Senators who are working hard for the American people, not for their own interests -- especially during the many crises we're now facing in this nation. When Jon and Raphael flip these crucial Senate seats, that's the kind of leadership they will provide for Georgia's families.
But we know that the GOP will do whatever it takes and spend any amount to keep Georgia red in November. So we need all hands on deck to ensure Democrats can compete -- and win.
**[Georgia is more competitive than ever -- and this is our chance to not only flip Georgia, but to take back control of the Senate. Can you make a $5 contribution right now?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200926-georgia-slate?refcode=em200926i_489&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200926-georgia-slate?refcode=em200926i_489&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693380/22080b68/7a2af4ad/4602172c/2151337397/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Friend -- Did you see Jon's note?

**The Senate GOP is doing everything they can to rush through Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation before the Election -- and Jon's opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, is leading the charge.**

_Within *minutes* of Amy Coney Barrett's nomination, Senator Perdue endorsed her for the Supreme Court!_

**Friend, the Senate has never been more important.**

**This race is a virtual TOSS-UP, but Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against us than any other Democratic Senate challenger.**

**[Can you express donate $20 before the crucial FEC deadline this week>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434b/2499441046/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_20")**

---

Thanks, friend.

Ellen Foster
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 26, 2020
**Subject:** Amy Coney Barrett

Friend,

Within *minutes* of Amy Coney Barrett's nomination, my opponent, GOP Senator David Perdue, endorsed her for the Supreme Court.

_Within minutes._

In 2016, Senator Perdue was ADAMANT that no Supreme Court confirmation should proceed in a presidential election year.

_He said it was a matter of principle!_

**Now, with 38 days until the Election -- and voting already underway -- he didn't even think the nominee needed to answer questions under oath before he announced his support.**

**_So much for David Perdue's principles._**

**[Help me beat hypocrite David Perdue and win the Senate>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434d/2499441046/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k")**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__
| **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434c/2499441046/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_10")**
---
| **[$20->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434b/2499441046/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_20")**
---
| **[$50->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434f/2499441046/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_50")**
---
| **[$75->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434e/2499441046/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_75")**
---
| **[$100->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f24351/2499441046/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_100")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434a/2499441046/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k_ex_other")**
---
This is why the Senate is so important.

**Here are some questions of VITAL CONCERN regarding this nominee that need answering:**
* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law and defend the public interest by upholding the Affordable Care Act,**which prevents insurance companies from denying health coverage to Americans suffering from cancer, diabetes, heart disease, and other pre-existing conditions?**_

* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law in_ **Roe v. Wade _and defend the fundamental right to privacy in health care?_**

* _Will Judge Barrett impartially uphold the rule of law and**protect Voting Rights and Civil Rights legislation that secures Americans' Constitutional right to Equal Protection?**_
My opponent doesn't care. He's not asking these questions. He's already made up his mind.

Because, for him, it's all about party loyalty -- no matter the consequences for his own constituents.

**The Senate must put the law and its Constitutional obligations ahead of partisanship.**

In the Senate, I'll support the thorough, deliberative, and full vetting of any Supreme Court nominee -- _no matter whether a President from my own party nominates them_ \-- because that's the obligation of a United States Senator.

**[Friend, with health care,_Roe v. Wade_ , civil rights, and voting rights at stake, winning the Senate has never mattered more >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434d/2499441046/VEsHBA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k")**
| [CHIP IN TO WIN THE SENATE](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e3b/5b2c1286/3b2a29b0/25f2434d/2499441046/VEsHBw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_djtpfsc?refcode=em_2020_09_27_djtpfsc_k")
---

This is the closest Senate race in the country, friend.

There's a reason Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger.

The stakes have never been higher.

I am grateful for your help.

Jon Ossoff

Friend,

President Trump has nominated Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court.

She has an unquestionable record as a strong, conservative Constitutionalist who will uphold the rule of law. Unfortunately, the Democrats will no doubt launch a vicious campaign to smear her simply because she was nominated by a Republican President.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I've endorsed 10 Warren Democrats running to flip Republican-held Senate seats. If we add four seats, we'll take back control.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Your donation would go an especially long way right now because Wednesday is our next quarterly FEC fundraising deadline -- the last one we'll hit before Election Day. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b0/45c30650/1c1af1e88/66e8ec9a/2596018786/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Americans don't like to be cheated -- and we've been cheated big time.

Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are breaking their own made-up rule so they can ram through Trump's Supreme Court nominee and steal another seat.

This kind of sleazy double-dealing is the last gasp of a desperate party that is undemocratically over-represented in Congress and in the halls of power across our country. The last gasp of a corrupt Republican leadership, numb to its own hypocrisy. The last gasp of Republican extremists who don't reflect the views of the majority of Americans or the values of democracy that we hold dear.

**Republicans are doing everything they possibly can to cling to power. It's up to us to vote them out in November. Control of the Senate is up for grabs, and it has never been more critical.

I've endorsed ten Warren Democrats running to flip Republican-held Senate seats. If we add four seats, we'll take back control. And we're organizing to elect over 100 Warren Democrats up and down the ballot.**

**[If you're able to make a donation at this time, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help elect Warren Democrats who will flip the Senate, expand our House majority, take back state houses across the country, and put people first at every level of government.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b0/45c30650/1c1af1e88/66e8ec9f/2596018786/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIyRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA5MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV22F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200927_V1S2_P")**

Your donation would go an especially long way right now because Wednesday is our next quarterly FEC fundraising deadline -- the last one we'll hit before Election Day.

After Wednesday, we'll release a public fundraising report. I'll just be blunt: We need that report to be as strong as possible. And we need to raise as much as possible so we can make all the investments we need to help Warren Democrats running in tight races across the country.

By investing in grassroots organizing up and down the ballot, you can help boost voter turnout in the states that will decide the presidency, the Senate, the House, you name it.

You can help make sure that every voter has a plan to cast their ballot and make their voice heard.

And you can help protect our democracy by making sure Democrats win BIG, so this election doesn't end up in the Court. Because understand this: Trump is counting on his nominee to swing the Court in his favor when he loses the election.

**There has never been a more important moment to get in this fight and stay in this fight until we win.**

**[If you can, please make a contribution today to help elect Warren Democrats who will flip the Senate, grow our House majority, and fight up and down the ballot for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b0/45c30650/1c1af1e88/66e8ec9f/2596018786/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIyRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA5MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV22F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200927_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b0/45c30650/1c1af1e88/66e8ec9f/2596018786/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjIyRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAyMDA5MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV22F_EOQ_LAU_E_20200927_V1S2_P")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: President Donald J. Trump tapped another Hoosier to serve our nation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:

body:
Sen. Cornyn's team has been seeing some really bad polling.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cec/7f51f7bc/44725be5/4efa407f/1113956956/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- Here's what a Republican strategist had to say about incumbents running in 2020: "If you're an incumbent in a bad environment sitting at 44% [in the polls] **you should be pretty damn scared. "**

Sen. Cornyn has seen approval ratings as low as 29% and he's even seeing polls that put him within just two points of MJ, so you can be sure he's **" pretty damn scared"** right now! For a three-term incumbent senator and Mitch McConnell's right hand man, this must be TERRIFYING. [**Help us give him even MORE reason to be nervous about his re-election chances.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cec/7f51f7bc/44725be5/4efa407e/1113956956/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200927.3nd__2184__&amount=10")

We can't become complacent though -- the more nervous Mitch McConnell and Sen. Cornyn's allies become, the more money they're going to start sending to Texas to bail him out. We're going to need your help to take on all of these big money donors -- [**can we count on you?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cec/7f51f7bc/44725be5/4efa407e/1113956956/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxODQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200927.3nd__2184__&amount=10") | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Re: One month since my opponent's anti-Semitic ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It's now been two months |
---
Friend, I sent this email back in August after a month had passed since my opponent, David Perdue, got caught running an anti-Semitic attack ad against me.

**_It's now been two months._**

In those two months, Senator Perdue has not apologized to Georgia's Jewish community or taken any responsibility for running an ad that distorted my face to enlarge and extend my nose, _the oldest, most obvious, least original anti-Semitic trope in history._

Instead my opponent denied responsibility and fired an outside vendor. It's pathetic, friend.

_And, of course, Perdue still can't muster up the courage to stand up to Donald Trump, a bigot and anti-Semite who declared himself the "King of Israel" and makes anti-Semitic comments to his aides._

**The people of Georgia deserve a Senator with a conscience and a spine.**

**[Today, please make a donation to bring compassion, unity, and tolerance to the U.S. Senate.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e75/5b2c1286/3b52cff0/25f2437f/3859633075/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_27_jo_as_an?refcode=em_2020_09_27_jo_as_an_k")**

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (personal)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** August 27, 2020
**Subject:** One month since my opponent's anti-Semitic ad

Friend,

It's been a month since my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue, got caught running an anti-Semitic attack ad that doctored a photo of my face to lengthen my nose.

**The Senator blamed an outside vendor and took no responsibility. David Perdue is a coward, and he's fully embraced the Trump playbook -- deny, deny, deny, and the buck always stops elsewhere.**

_In fact, Perdue claimed victimhood and implied that since he had visited Israel, he couldn't be an anti-Semite._

Anti-Semitism is on the rise, unfortunately. Just last week, someone painted six swastikas in Cobb County here in Georgia.

**Our leaders should be healing this country and working to oppose racism, sectarianism, and prejudice -- not participating in it and then claiming victimhood.**

Georgia deserves a Senator with a conscience and a spine. Georgia deserves better than David Perdue.

**[Friend, I will lead with tolerance, unity, and compassion. Please, make a donation to my campaign to defeat David Perdue.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e75/5b2c1286/3b52cff0/25f2437f/3859633075/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_27_jo_as_an?refcode=em_2020_09_27_jo_as_an_k")**

If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e75/5b2c1286/3b52cff0/25f24289/3859633075/VEsEBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!
clean_body: It's now been two months | Friend, I sent this email back in August after a month had passed since my opponent, David Perdue, got caught running an anti-Semitic attack ad against me. It's now been two months. In those two months, Senator Perdue has not apologized to Georgia's Jewish community or taken any responsibility for running an ad that distorted my face to enlarge and extend my nose, the oldest, most obvious, least original anti-Semitic trope in history. Instead my opponent denied responsibility and fired an outside vendor. It's pathetic, friend. And, of course, Perdue still can't muster up the courage to stand up to Donald Trump, a bigot and anti-Semite who declared himself the "King of Israel" and makes anti-Semitic comments to his aides. The people of Georgia deserve a Senator with a conscience and a spine. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for standing with me. Jon \-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- From: Jon Ossoff (personal) To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: August 27, 2020 Subject: One month since my opponent's anti-Semitic ad Friend, It's been a month since my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue, got caught running an anti-Semitic attack ad that doctored a photo of my face to lengthen my nose. The Senator blamed an outside vendor and took no responsibility. David Perdue is a coward, and he's fully embraced the Trump playbook -- deny, deny, deny, and the buck always stops elsewhere. In fact, Perdue claimed victimhood and implied that since he had visited Israel, he couldn't be an anti-Semite. Anti-Semitism is on the rise, unfortunately. Just last week, someone painted six swastikas in Cobb County here in Georgia. Our leaders should be healing this country and working to oppose racism, sectarianism, and prejudice -- not participating in it and then claiming victimhood. Georgia deserves a Senator with a conscience and a spine. Georgia deserves better than David Perdue. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We are WINNING in IL-16
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9483f5609a1d/we-are-winning-in-il-16?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

It has been a whirlwind week. We had a bunch of successful meet and greets, including great turnout in Dekalb (the bluest part of the district) and Ogle County (the very reddest)! Voters all over IL-16 keep showing up, more and more of them, to hear from us and ask earnest questions and get sincere answers.

I’m talking to strong Republicans every day now and they are overwhelmingly Dani supporters when we get off the phone.

And, as most of you know, we had the big debate yesterday. **The debate was a resounding, unmitigated victory for our campaign. Not to put too fine a point on it, but I trounced him. **

I am having the time of my life. From here, we do exactly what we have set out to do: we call voters, we make sure everyone knows that I stand for working families and competent, compassionate leadership, and we solicit donations to pay our incredible staff.

**And in November, we win - thanks to people like you, who’ve believed in us and invested in our success. **

THANK YOU for being a part of this campaign. We’ve got 37 days left. [Can you get in here with a $37 donation?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=75c1e7d99d&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani
